title: Oxyramphis macrostyla
taxonomy: Oxyramphis macrostyla belongs to the family of plants known as Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse family of legumes. This classification places Oxyramphis macrostyla within the broader group of flowering plants, also known as angiosperms. Fabaceae is further divided into various subfamilies, and Oxyramphis macrostyla falls under the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Oxyramphis is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species, which is Oxyramphis macrostyla. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Oxyramphis macrostyla within the plant kingdom.
